updated_conclusion: The Settings/GlobalSettings record-builder family has ten real direct CALL rel32 callers in the 947 win64c client: six to 0x140679500 and four to 0x140679720. The caller set covers Config/init/directlogin/totp/login/vt-varc/console-style record producers and replaces the previous table-consumer hunt with concrete callsite ownership.
evidence_source: Fresh headless no-analysis run rs2quick65 with GhidraDumpWindowsPy.py and GhidraCallsiteArgsPy.py over all ten direct callsites.
Fresh headless no-analysis run rs2quick66 with GhidraReadCStringPy.py over literal sources used by those callsites.

variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.suffix_source: RDX is a local/string object rooted at RSP+0x40, with an optional qword unwrap controlled by bit 7 of byte [RSP+0x57].
variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.post_call_clue: Immediately feeds the built record to 0x14067AA00 with literal 0x140B5E090 ('DeviceCapOverrides').
Then calls 0x14067A3C0 with literal 0x140B5E060 ('acceptedDownloads') and advances state [RSI+0x53808] from 3 to 4.

variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.suffix_source: RDX is a local/string object rooted at RSP+0x40, with an optional qword unwrap controlled by bit 7 of byte [RSP+0x57].
variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.post_call_clue: Immediately feeds the built record to 0x14067AA00 with literal 0x140B5E080 ('Language').

variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.suffix_source: qword [object+0x19E90], optionally unwrapped through [source] when bit 7 of byte [source+0x17] is set.
variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.post_call_clue: Followed by construction around [RBX+0x6F80] using descriptor 0x140B61B90.
variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.classification: directlogin record producer in the same 0x19E90 source-object family.

variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.suffix_source: qword [RDI+0x19E90], optionally unwrapped through [source] when bit 7 of byte [source+0x17] is set.
variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.correction: Fresh contiguous decode shows the destination is R14+0xAA8; this supersedes the earlier R14+0xAB8 wording.

variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.suffix_source: qword [RDI+0x19E90], optionally unwrapped through [source] when bit 7 of byte [source+0x17] is set.
variable_kind_builder_0x140679500_caller.post_call_clue: Then stores related literals 0x140B69908 ('atotp') and 0x140B69904 ('dn') into the surrounding record.

fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.stack_arg7_provider_object: local descriptor at RBP+0x58 seeded from pointer-like descriptor 0x140B69FC0
fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.suffix_source: RDI or [RDI] depending on bit 7 of byte [RDI+0x17].

fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.record_destination: RAX+0xC8 from the surrounding object setup
fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.suffix_source: source object or [source] depending on bit 7 of byte [source+0x17].
fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.classification: vt-varc fixed-kind producer immediately before directlogin setup.

fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.stack_arg7_provider_object: local descriptor at RBP seeded from pointer-like descriptor 0x140B859D8
fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.suffix_source: RBX from [RDX+0x19E90], optionally unwrapped through [RBX] when bit 7 of byte [RBX+0x17] is set.
RCX or [RCX] depending on bit 7 of byte [RCX+0x17].
fixed_kind_builder_0x140679720_callers.classification: Config fixed-kind producer inside a larger object initializer.

new_native_tool.capability: Parses PE sections and scans executable bytes for raw x86/x64 E8 rel32 direct calls to exact VA/RVA targets without relying on Ghidra xrefs.

schema.capability: Documents the JSON result shape for automation and future callsite hunts.

tool_feedback_loop.tests: tests/test_pe.py covers a synthetic PE direct-call hit; tests/test_cli.py covers the new schema registry entry.
tool_feedback_loop.docs: README.md now lists pe-direct-calls and its schema kind.

relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-builder-pdata-false-xrefs: Completes the pivot away from .pdata false xrefs by finding the real direct call owners.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-record-builder-factory-mo: Expands the variable-kind builder from the known totp/login pair to six concrete callsites and corrects the first totp destination offset.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-sibling-record-builder-ca: Replaces the open 'find concrete code callers' item with four direct callers and names three of their base labels.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-record-builder-root-label: Preserves Settings/GlobalSettings root semantics while adding caller-provided base/suffix names for specific records.

bounded_inference.statement: The builder family appears to be a shared persistent settings-record producer rather than a login-only helper. The direct callers cover bootstrap/config records, account login records, variable-client state ('vt-varc'), direct login, and console/player-related fixed-kind records. Several provider descriptors are still pointer-like rather than C strings and need qword/vtable decoding before their lifetimes can be named.

next_targets: Decode pointer-like descriptors 0x140B69FC0, 0x140B859D8, and the local provider objects passed as stack_arg7 to 0x140679720.
Trace directlogin and vt-varc surrounding owners at 0x1400CCDB0/0x1400CCE3B upward to name the enclosing object offsets RBX+0x77D0 and RAX+0xC8.
Use pe-direct-calls on downstream factory 0x14067C1F0 and sink constructor 0x14067C440 to separate all settings-entry producers from this newly mapped builder subset.
